n: Prologue: The Wisdom of the Thrushes

steps.t: Noglond can be found far to the south of Thorin's Hall. The stable-master Wíli can be found in the west end of Frerin's Court. Dwalin wants you to see…
Wíli is in the west end of Frerin's Court. Wíli told you to travel to Noglond by way of one of his horses and to speak with Rothgar when you arrive th…
Nos Grimsong is at the Thrushstones, north-west of Noglond. Rothgar told you seek Nos Grimsong and see if he has heard anything from the thrushes abou…
Rothgar is in Noglond, to the south-east. Nos Grimsong wrote down what he learned from the thrushes about the movements of the Dourhands in recent day…
